description: البحث عن مجلدات المشاريع التي تحتوي على package.json وجمع قوائم الحزم المثبتة وأحجامها
command_preview:
# Step 1: Find all project folders with package.json (excluding node_modules)
$projects = Get-ChildItem -Path $env:USERPROFILE -Recurse -Filter 'package.json' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|antigravity|\.gemini' } | Select-Object -First 10 -ExpandProperty DirectoryName

Write-Output '=== PROJECT FOLDERS FOUND ==='
$projects | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ }

# Step 2: For each project, list dependencies and node_modules sizes
foreach ($proj
output:
